emergency.label: All Purpose
emergency.number: 999 or 112 (both work identically, free from any phone)

entryRequirements.visaNote: Most Western nationalities visa-free for tourism up to 6 months, but the UK's ETA (Electronic Travel Authorisation) is required in advance for many non-visa nationals as of 2025 rules — check current ETA requirement by nationality before travel.

transportInfo.paymentCard: Contactless bank card or Visitor Oyster card — contactless is now generally preferred/simpler for short stays
transportInfo.note: Daily fare capping applies automatically with contactless/Oyster — you're never charged more than a day pass equivalent.

majorEventsNote: Notting Hill Carnival (August bank holiday weekend) and Wimbledon (late June/early July) are major tourist-relevant events with big crowd/price impact.
